title: SystemVerilog + SystemC: Invalid operator& and lvalue required errors with PULP Platform AXI CDC design (v5.032)

features.name: struct typed output port in systemc mode
features.description: Code should include a struct type declared as an output port when using Verilator's SystemC integration mode (-sc)
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [1093:0] data; } mem_resp_t;
module top(output mem_resp_t slave_axi_resp_o);

features.name: large packed bit vector over 1000 bits in struct
features.description: Code should include a struct with a packed bit vector exceeding 1000 bits in width
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [1093:0] data; } mem_resp_t;

features.name: struct output port array indexing in systemc mode
features.description: Code should include array indexing on a struct-typed output port when compiling with -sc flag
